markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content strategy, performance, and upcoming SEO initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/HR5BicKzyuGF4MqqECTEWahXUtzE7SD4?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Deprioritizing Competitor Content:** Pausing all comparison/alternative posts due to legal sensitivity. The recent "compliance tools" article will serve as a test case for a neutral, buyer's guide approach.](https://fathom.video/share/HR5BicKzyuGF4MqqECTEWahXUtzE7SD4?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
  - [**Launching New GRC Cluster:** A new cluster of 14 article refreshes is launching to improve performance tracking and leverage high-intent keywords. Review is due by EOW/Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/HR5BicKzyuGF4MqqECTEWahXUtzE7SD4?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
  - [**Investigating SEO Declines:** A recent drop in top-3 keyword rankings will be investigated. A quick-win test (e.g., meta title updates) on 20-30 pages was proposed to boost performance.](https://fathom.video/share/HR5BicKzyuGF4MqqECTEWahXUtzE7SD4?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [**High-Intent LLM Traffic:** Traffic from LLMs (e.g., ChatGPT) shows significantly higher engagement (50-80% ER) on educational content, validating the content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/HR5BicKzyuGF4MqqECTEWahXUtzE7SD4?tab=summary&timestamp=1324.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance & Declines

  - [A decline in top-3 Google rankings was noted since September, prompting an investigation into quick-win solutions.](https://fathom.video/share/HR5BicKzyuGF4MqqECTEWahXUtzE7SD4?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [**Proposed Test:** A bulk refresh of meta titles and descriptions on 20-30 pages to measure impact before a wider rollout.](https://fathom.video/share/HR5BicKzyuGF4MqqECTEWahXUtzE7SD4?tab=summary&timestamp=1914.0)
  - [**Analysis:** SEMrush data shows the largest traffic drop is for the homepage (20k+ lost traffic) and the generic term "due diligence."](https://fathom.video/share/HR5BicKzyuGF4MqqECTEWahXUtzE7SD4?tab=summary&timestamp=1939.0)
      - [**Action:** Add the "due diligence" article and "the role of executive committee" to the refresh queue as high-impact opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/HR5BicKzyuGF4MqqECTEWahXUtzE7SD4?tab=summary&timestamp=1939.0)

### Content Strategy & Performance

  - [**Deprioritizing Competitor Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/HR5BicKzyuGF4MqqECTEWahXUtzE7SD4?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
      - [**Rationale:** To avoid legal issues, all content with "vs," "alternative," or "comparison" intent is on hold.](https://fathom.video/share/HR5BicKzyuGF4MqqECTEWahXUtzE7SD4?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
      - [**Test Case:** The recent "compliance tools" article will be monitored for performance.](https://fathom.video/share/HR5BicKzyuGF4MqqECTEWahXUtzE7SD4?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
      - [**Proposed Argument for Legal:** A neutral, balanced approach that positions Diligent for its ICP while acknowledging competitors' niches could de-risk future comparisons.](https://fathom.video/share/HR5BicKzyuGF4MqqECTEWahXUtzE7SD4?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
  - [**New GRC Content Cluster:**](https://fathom.video/share/HR5BicKzyuGF4MqqECTEWahXUtzE7SD4?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
      - [**Rationale:** To enable more accurate performance tracking of GRC content, which currently spans the board, risk, and info security clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/HR5BicKzyuGF4MqqECTEWahXUtzE7SD4?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
      - [**Scope:** 14 article refreshes with primary keywords identified.](https://fathom.video/share/HR5BicKzyuGF4MqqECTEWahXUtzE7SD4?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
      - [**Opportunity:** High-intent keywords with a low difficulty score, signaling a strong chance for quick wins.](https://fathom.video/share/HR5BicKzyuGF4MqqECTEWahXUtzE7SD4?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)
  - [**LLM Traffic Insights (Oct):**](https://fathom.video/share/HR5BicKzyuGF4MqqECTEWahXUtzE7SD4?tab=summary&timestamp=1324.0)
      - [Traffic from LLMs is growing, landing on educational content across the buyer's journey (trends, pain points).](https://fathom.video/share/HR5BicKzyuGF4MqqECTEWahXUtzE7SD4?tab=summary&timestamp=1324.0)
      - [**Engagement Rate:** Significantly higher than organic traffic, often exceeding 50-80%.](https://fathom.video/share/HR5BicKzyuGF4MqqECTEWahXUtzE7SD4?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)
      - [**Significance:** Validates the content strategy and suggests LLM users are highly qualified leads for the sales team.](https://fathom.video/share/HR5BicKzyuGF4MqqECTEWahXUtzE7SD4?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

### Operational Updates

  - [**Product Info Matrix:**](https://fathom.video/share/HR5BicKzyuGF4MqqECTEWahXUtzE7SD4?tab=summary&timestamp=1066.0)
      - [The product info matrix is with Product Marketing Managers (PMMs) for review.](https://fathom.video/share/HR5BicKzyuGF4MqqECTEWahXUtzE7SD4?tab=summary&timestamp=1066.0)
      - [**Feedback:** Deprioritize the ESG section; link to the main ESG page but focus content on core solutions.](https://fathom.video/share/HR5BicKzyuGF4MqqECTEWahXUtzE7SD4?tab=summary&timestamp=1066.0)
      - [**ETA:** End of Monday (mid-week is more realistic).](https://fathom.video/share/HR5BicKzyuGF4MqqECTEWahXUtzE7SD4?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)
      - [**Purpose:** To update the "company context artifact" with clear product positioning and messaging for writers.](https://fathom.video/share/HR5BicKzyuGF4MqqECTEWahXUtzE7SD4?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)
  - [**SEO Deep Dive Request:**](https://fathom.video/share/HR5BicKzyuGF4MqqECTEWahXUtzE7SD4?tab=summary&timestamp=1571.0)
      - [**Scope:** A granular analysis of organic and LLM performance for the Governance, ERM, and GRC clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/HR5BicKzyuGF4MqqECTEWahXUtzE7SD4?tab=summary&timestamp=1614.0)
      - [**Focus:** Identify performance gaps and untapped potential within each cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/HR5BicKzyuGF4MqqECTEWahXUtzE7SD4?tab=summary&timestamp=1614.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jo:**](https://fathom.video/share/HR5BicKzyuGF4MqqECTEWahXUtzE7SD4?tab=summary&timestamp=2018.0)
      - [Send GRC topic list to Kezia for review by EOW/Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/HR5BicKzyuGF4MqqECTEWahXUtzE7SD4?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
      - [Share the product info matrix with the content manager once PMM feedback is received.](https://fathom.video/share/HR5BicKzyuGF4MqqECTEWahXUtzE7SD4?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)
      - [Add "due diligence" and "role of executive committee" articles to the refresh queue.](https://fathom.video/share/HR5BicKzyuGF4MqqECTEWahXUtzE7SD4?tab=summary&timestamp=1939.0)
      - [Send meeting recording and a summary of priority topics to Kezia.](https://fathom.video/share/HR5BicKzyuGF4MqqECTEWahXUtzE7SD4?tab=summary&timestamp=2018.0)
  - [**Kezia:**](https://fathom.video/share/HR5BicKzyuGF4MqqECTEWahXUtzE7SD4?tab=summary&timestamp=2018.0)
      - [Review the GRC topic list by EOW/Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/HR5BicKzyuGF4MqqECTEWahXUtzE7SD4?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
      - [Provide internal materials (transcripts, reports) to the content manager to support GRC content.](https://fathom.video/share/HR5BicKzyuGF4MqqECTEWahXUtzE7SD4?tab=summary&timestamp=968.0)
      - [Chase PMMs for feedback on the product info matrix.](https://fathom.video/share/HR5BicKzyuGF4MqqECTEWahXUtzE7SD4?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)
